       2e118:	465c      	mov	r4, fp

       2e11a:	e77f      	b.n	2e01c <print_integer+0x210>

       2e11c:	4651      	mov	r1, sl

       2e11e:	2e00      	cmp	r6, #0

       2e120:	d0b7      	beq.n	2e092 <print_integer+0x286>

       2e122:	e75d      	b.n	2dfe0 <print_integer+0x1d4>

    
out_wrapped_function (12)
